name: Møre og Romsdal (Norway)

colors.symbolism: the field of the county arms
for the three figures, evoking the three districts

description: A blue field charged with three identical stylised gold heraldic figures in a horizontal arrangement.
history: Adopted by More og Romsdal county in 1978. The three identical figures stand for the three districts of the county: Sunnmore, Romsdal, and Nordmore. More og Romsdal survived the 2020 county reorganisation and continues unchanged.

features.symbolism: heraldic banner of the county arms: three gold figures on a blue field, taken from Viking Age artifacts found in the region; the three figures represent the three traditional districts of Sunnmore, Romsdal, and Nordmore
the three traditional districts: Sunnmore, Romsdal, and Nordmore
